category_sources: source_facts.description says Takt is a text-based music programming language; SourceForge project files page calls it Text-based Music Programming Tools.
display_name_sources: SourceForge project page and source_facts.name identify the project as Takt/takt.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official project homepage; SourceForge files include an official README and release archives.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official sources found are SourceForge homepage/files and release tarballs, not a distinct official source-control repository URL.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and SourceForge README/files describe a text-based music programming language with MIDI/file conversion tooling.
